author: Shirotora Kenshin
description:
This mod adds unique models to the Swordsman unit, for all 10 nations. The other units will hopefully get the same attention with time. 

Credits: 
And (Research),
Mohawk Games (for their fantastic 'Old World' Game),
Harry (C# DLL Modding),
Shirotora Kenshin (3D Artwork, XML).
disclaimer: These unit renders are shown at close range; the mod's textures were authored to read at in-game distance, not for close-up viewing.
